message:
🐛 Fix /nodes endpoint to support querying all clusters (#116)

The offline detection card calls /api/mcp/nodes without a cluster
parameter to get nodes across all clusters. Updated the handler
to query all clusters when no cluster parameter is provided,
similar to how /gpu-nodes works.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
